name: Ginger Spiced Tea
directions: Combine first 5 ingredients in heavy large saucepan.
Cover and simmer 10 minutes.
Add milk and tea, bring to boil and simmer 2 minutes.
Turn off heat and steep 4 to 6 minutes, according to desired strength.
Mix in sugar.
Strain tea.

name: Spiced Mocha Mix
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
Store in an airtight container.
**For1 serving, spoon 2 1/2 tablespoons mix into mug.
Add 1 cup hot milk or water, stirring until dissolved.
Top with marshmallows, if desired.

name: Rich and Bold Bloody Mary
directions: Fill a 12 oz glass half way with ice.
Add Worcestershire, vodka, and Tabasco.
Sprinkle celery salt on top.
Fill to top with Bloody Mary mix.
Add a celery stick or pickle spear and stir.

name: Raw Oyster Shooters
directions: Combine juice through horseradish, mixing thoroughly; pour 1 jigger of mixture into each of 6 small glasses.
Add 2 jiggers vodka to each.
Put 1 raw oyster in each glass and garnish with a lemon wedge.

name: Bloody Mary  (By the Pitcher)
directions: Combine tomato juice, Clamato juice and vodka in a large pitcher and stir to blend.
Add remaining ingredients (except hot sauce) and stir with a wooden spoon until all is well blended.
Taste, then add hot sauce depending on how spicy you like your bloody mary (my husband likes plenty of spice!).
On a small plate, combine coarse salt and Old Bay seasoning.
Run a lemon or lime slice around the rim of your glass, then dip the rim into the Old Bay/salt mixture.
Add ice to your glass (if desired) and pour in the bloody mary mixture.
Garnish with desired items.

name: Easy Mocha (Chocolate and Coffee)
directions: Add the instant coffee granules, hot chocolate mix (and skim milk powder if using) into a mug.
Add hot water and stir constantly to dissolve.
Drink, but please be careful and not scald your tongue!
NOTE: If you prefer a more chocolate-y taste, add some more hot chocolate mix or simply dump in cocoa powder. Please do not add chocolate syrup, it kills the taste completely!

name: Maria's Martinis
directions: In a cocktail shaker, combine gin or vodka, vermouth, and ice cubes.  Shake until thoroughly chilled.  Strain into a stemmed cocktail glass or serve on the rocks in a old-fashioned glass.  Garnish with a jalapeño.

name: Dante's Downfall
directions: Pour liqueur into a heatproof snifter or Irish coffee mug.  Add peppercorns.  Heat by tilting and rotating over a candle or gas flame until the first bubble forms, and then carefully ignite with a match and serve flaming.

name: Blanco Burro
directions: Place 6-8 ice cubes in a cocktail shaker, and add Cointreau, Chartreuse, and cream.  Shake well and strain into an old-fashioned glass.  Add more ice cubes to fill glass.  Gently sprinkle glass with red hots.

name: The S.o.b.'s Delight
directions: Fill a double-old-fashioned glass to the rim with ice cubes.  Add brandy, bourbon, vodka, and crème de menthe.  Stir vigorously.  Garnish with mint.

name: Gulf Stream Gulp
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker with ice and pour in Sambuca and Chartreuse.  Vigorously stir or shake until foamy.  Serve in a snifter or pony glass.

name: Tijuana Taxi
directions: Combine all ingredients in a shaker and serve in a rocks glass with a wedge of lime.
Enjoy!  ;).

name: Hot Cayenne Pepper Vodka
directions: Pour a shot or two of vodka out for yourself to compensate for the space the peppers will take.
Cut a slit into each pepper. Remove seeds and inner tendril. Try to keep the peppers looking pretty.
Insert each pepper into the bottle. Close bottle and store for at least 1 month if 80 proof, 3 months if 90 proof, the longer the better.

name: Bloody Mary Mix
directions: In pitcher, thoroughly combine vegetable juice, Worcestershire sauce, lime juice, sugar, pepper, Tabasco sauce and garlic powder; cover and chill.
Add vodka, to taste, and serve over ice with celery sticks and a lime wedge for garnish.

name: Lorena's Michilada
directions: Combine all ingredients in a 14 oz or larger glass.  Take a sip to test if you'd more lemon juice or salt, etc and adjust accordingly.
Add ice, stir, and enjoy!

name: CoffaCream
directions: 1. Put the coffee into your favorite mug and pour boiling water to your liking.
2. Add milk to your taste
3. Add two Tbs of Vanilla Ice Cream
4. Finish off with a sprinkle (Half a teaspoon) of Ground Cinnamon
5. Enjoy.

name: Strawberry Sriracha Margarita
directions: Add all ingredients to a blender, blend until smooth. Pour into a sugar rimmed margarita glass.

name: Jalapeno Passion Margarita
directions: Jalapeno Syrup:  Make in advance.  In a small pan, combine the jalapeno, sugar and water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat.  Stir until the sugar dissolves. Strain the syrup.  Cool in refrigerator about 15 minutes.
For the drink:  Rim glass with sugar or salt, if desired.  Mix remaining ingredients together with ice; shake and strain.
